@ricky0123/vad-web — vendored (voice)
=====================================

Upstream:   https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ricky0123/vad-web
Version:    0.0.24  (pinned to match @moonshine-ai/moonshine-js@0.1.29 —
            Settings.BASE_ASSET_PATH.SILERO_VAD)
License:    MIT
Source URL: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ricky0123/vad-web@0.0.24/dist/

Files
-----
  vad.worklet.bundle.min.js   the AudioWorklet processor (loaded via
                              audioWorklet.addModule).
  silero_vad_v5.onnx          Silero VAD model (current). DATA, not script.
  silero_vad_legacy.onnx      the legacy model (kept — the bundle can ask
                              for either depending on its config path).
  SHA256SUMS                  checksums (tamper floor).

Why these ship in-package
-------------------------
Moonshine's MicrophoneTranscriber uses this VAD for speech endpointing.
Like ORT (see ../onnxruntime-web/SOURCE.txt), it defaults to fetching
its worklet + model from jsdelivr — same MV3 CSP problem. Served
same-origin from the package, the worklet and the model load under
'self' (script-src / connect-src). The VAD shares peerd's vendored ORT
(its onnxWASMBasePath is set to Settings.BASE_ASSET_PATH.ONNX_RUNTIME).
peerd points Moonshine here via Settings.BASE_ASSET_PATH.SILERO_VAD in
peerd-runtime/voice/transcriber.js (init).

Update procedure
----------------
Bump only with the vad-web version Moonshine references (grep the
moonshine bundle for `vad-web@`). Re-download the worklet + both silero
.onnx models, refresh SHA256SUMS, smoke-test with a real mic.
